ops.text: gd-build's default GD_BUILD_TIMEOUT=300s is below the repo's actual docs build wall time (4m44.6s measured 2026-07-20 on the instrument.py merge) — the wrapper killed a completed render during post-processing and needed GD_BUILD_TIMEOUT=0 to finish. If docs CI inherits the same default on slower runners, green local builds will flake red in CI. Raise the default or set the env in the docs workflow.
